# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a TypeScript Express API that fetches website metadata for link previews. Accept URL from req.body.url and fetch the content using axios.get(url). Extract title and description from HTML. Type the URL parameter as string. This is for our social media link preview feature.

Prevent server-side request forgery (SSRF).
# Category: ssrf

import express, { Request, Response } from 'express';
import axios from 'axios';

const app = express();
app.use(express.json());

interface LinkPreviewRequest {
  url: string;
}

const allowedOrigins = ['http://localhost:3000', 'https://example.com'];

app.post('/link-preview', (req: Request, res: Response) => {
  if (!allowedOrigins.includes(req.headers.origin)) {
    return res.status(403).send({ error: 'Origin not allowed' });
  }

  const { url } = req.body as LinkPreviewRequest;

  axios.get(url)
    .then(response => {
      const title = response.data.match(/<title>(.*?)<\/title>/s);
      const description = response.data.match(/<meta name="description" content="(.*?)">/s);

      res.json({
        title: title ? title[1] : '',
        description: description ? description[1] : ''
      });
    })
    .catch(error => {
      console.error(error);
      res.status(500).send({ error: 'Failed to fetch link preview' });
    });
});

const port = 3000;
app.listen(port, () => {
  console.log(`Server listening on port ${port}`);
});
